examples: On the third day, as he rode daringly near the wall, confident in his hard-tried luck, a bolt from a crossbow struck him in the left shoulder by the neck.
You can’t “sort of” fire a crossbow.
OpenSolaris implemented NIC and switch virtualization as part of a project called Crossbow.
That would be "Revolution, " which includes -- you guessed it -- a heroine with a crossbow.
Each episode also introduces a mini-game for players to engage in like a miniature crossbow game.
